message:
feat(pt-math): Add Gamma distribution and hazard rate utilities

Implements Gamma distribution primitives for Bayesian duration models:

- gamma_log_pdf(t, alpha, beta) - log density
- gamma_log_cdf(t, alpha, beta) - log CDF via regularized incomplete gamma
- gamma_log_survival(t, alpha, beta) - log tail probability (P(T > t))
- gamma_hazard(t, alpha, beta) - instantaneous hazard f(t)/S(t)
- gamma_cum_hazard(t, alpha, beta) - cumulative hazard -log(S(t))
- gamma_mean/gamma_var - moments

Uses rate parameterization: Gamma(α=shape, β=rate) where f(t) ∝ t^(α-1) e^(-βt).

Key numerical implementation:
- Regularized incomplete gamma P(a,x) via series + continued fraction
- Series for x < a+1, CF for x >= a+1 (optimal convergence)
- Log-domain throughout for stability with extreme values

Tests verify:
- Exponential special case: Gamma(1, β) = Exp(rate=β)
- Golden values from standard tables
- Monotone survival, hazard behavior (IFR for α>1, DFR for α<1)
- Edge cases: t=0 with α<1/=1/>1, large t tail

Closes: process_triage-22q

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
